calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:38am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported, D525
Cause Called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, King American Ambulance, Inc. appears by collector, Shamtorrica Stroud as pro per; appellant, Rosemary Myint appears as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their case in the narrative, and respondent to questions from Judge Myles.

respondent informed the Court that the King American Ambulance, Inc. would like to dismissed the case;appellant has Medi-Cal and respondent would take the payment from Medi-Cal. Juge Myles said if the parties agreed, he would order the appeal dismissed and abandoned by appellant; both parties agreed in open court. Judge than stated that the lower court judgment will stands and for the respondent either filed the satifaction of judgment or motion to vacate the judgment with the lower court; both parties understands.

9:40am
matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Judgment Entered
